---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---
```{=html}
<div style="padding:3rem 6vw; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto;">

  <div style="margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
    <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.15em; color:#0ea5e9; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">// praticiens</p>
    <h1 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,2.8rem); font-weight:800; color:#0f172a; margin:0 0 0.5rem 0;">Les gens qui construisent</h1>
    <p style="color:#94a3b8; font-size:0.9rem; margin:0 0 2rem 0;">Profils de praticiens tech — Data, DevOps, Cloud, IA, Cybersécurité, MLOps, Dev.</p>

    <!-- Recherche -->
    <input id="search-input" type="text" placeholder="Rechercher par nom, rôle, ville, stack..."
      oninput="renderPraticiens(getFiltered())"
      style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.78rem; background:#f0f9ff; border:1px solid #bae6fd; color:#0f172a; padding:0.55rem 1rem; border-radius:2px; width:100%; max-width:480px; outline:none; margin-bottom:1.25rem;"
      onfocus="this.style.borderColor='#0ea5e9'" onblur="this.style.borderColor='#bae6fd'"/>

    <!-- Filtres -->
    <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.5rem;">
      <button onclick="filterPraticiens('all', this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #0ea5e9; color:#0ea5e9; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;">
        Tous
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterPraticiens('open', this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #bae6fd; color:#94a3b8; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;">
        ● Disponibles
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterPraticiens('data', this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #bae6fd; color:#94a3b8; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;">
        Data
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterPraticiens('devops', this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #bae6fd; color:#94a3b8; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;">
        DevOps
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterPraticiens('cloud', this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #bae6fd; color:#94a3b8; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;">
        Cloud
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterPraticiens('ia', this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #bae6fd; color:#94a3b8; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;">
        IA
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterPraticiens('cybersecurite', this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #bae6fd; color:#94a3b8; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;">
        Cybersécurité
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterPraticiens('mlops', this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #bae6fd; color:#94a3b8; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;">
        MLOps
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div id="praticiens-grid" style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr)); gap:1.25rem;"></div>
  <p id="no-results" style="display:none; color:#94a3b8; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.85rem; margin-top:2rem;">Aucun praticien dans cette catégorie.</p>

</div>

<script>
const praticiens = [
  {
    slug:         "diakite",
    name:         "Diakité Mamadou Youssouf",
    role:         "Expert & Architecte Data",
    country:      "🇨🇮",
    city:         "Abidjan",
    stack:        ["Python", "Airflow", "dbt", "Spark", "GCP"],
    category:     "data",
    open_to_work: false,
    linkedin:     "https://www.linkedin.com/in/mamadou-youssouf-diakite-083630135",
    github:       "https://github.com/diakite-data",
    bio:          "Fondateur de from0tohero.dev. 1100+ apprenants formés en Data Engineering.",
    badges:       ["MENTOR", "SPEAKER", "OPEN SOURCE"]
  }
];

function renderPraticiens(list) {
  const grid = document.getElementById('praticiens-grid');
  const noRes = document.getElementById('no-results');
  if (!list.length) { grid.innerHTML = ''; noRes.style.display = 'block'; return; }
  noRes.style.display = 'none';
  grid.innerHTML = list.map(p => `
    <a href="${p.slug}.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
      <div style="background:#f0f9ff; border:1px solid #bae6fd; border-radius:6px; padding:1.5rem; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0.75rem; transition:border-color 0.2s;"
           onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='#0ea5e9'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='#bae6fd'">

        <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start;">
          <div>
            <p style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1rem; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a; margin:0;">${p.name}</p>
            <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; color:#0ea5e9; margin:0.2rem 0 0 0;">${p.role}</p>
          </div>
          <span style="font-size:1.2rem;">${p.country}</span>
        </div>

        ${p.badges && p.badges.length ? `
        <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.35rem; margin-top:0.1rem;">
          ${p.badges.map(b => {
            const badgeColors = { 'MENTOR':'#f97316', 'SPEAKER':'#a78bfa', 'OPEN SOURCE':'#34d399', 'CERTIFIÉ':'#60a5fa' };
            const col = badgeColors[b] || '#94a3b8';
            return `<span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.6rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; color:${col}; border:1px solid ${col}33; background:${col}0d; padding:1px 7px; border-radius:2px;">${b}</span>`;
          }).join('')}
        </div>` : ''}

        <p style="font-size:0.83rem; color:#475569; line-height:1.6; margin:0;">${p.bio}</p>

        <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.4rem;">
          ${p.stack.map(s => `
            <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.06em; color:#94a3b8; border:1px solid #bae6fd; padding:2px 7px; border-radius:2px;">${s}</span>
          `).join('')}
        </div>

        <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-top:0.25rem;">
          <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; color:#94a3b8;">${p.city}</span>
          ${p.open_to_work
            ? `<span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; color:#00e676;">● disponible</span>`
            : `<span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; color:#94a3b8;">○ non dispo</span>`
          }
        </div>

      </div>
    </a>
  `).join('');
}

let activeFilter = 'all';

function getFiltered() {
  const q = (document.getElementById('search-input')?.value || '').toLowerCase();
  let list = praticiens;
  if (activeFilter === 'open') list = list.filter(p => p.open_to_work);
  else if (activeFilter !== 'all') list = list.filter(p => p.category === activeFilter);
  if (q) list = list.filter(p =>
    p.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
    p.role.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
    p.city.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
    p.stack.join(' ').toLowerCase().includes(q)
  );
  return list;
}

function filterPraticiens(filter, btn) {
  activeFilter = filter;
  document.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b => {
    b.style.borderColor = '#bae6fd';
    b.style.color = '#94a3b8';
  });
  btn.style.borderColor = '#0ea5e9';
  btn.style.color = '#0ea5e9';
  renderPraticiens(getFiltered());
}

renderPraticiens(praticiens);
</script>
```
